title: Reload Attack on Titan gallery image

requirements.text: Regenerate and reload the Attack on Titan T-shirt image used in the AttackOnTitanGallery component to refresh the static asset with an updated version.
acceptanceCriteria: The Attack on Titan gallery image is visibly updated/refreshed in the AttackOnTitanGallery component
The image loads correctly without errors in the gallery
Existing gallery navigation (arrows, thumbnails) continues to function as before

nonGoals: Modifying the AttackOnTitanGallery component logic or swipe behavior
Changing any other product images or gallery components

required: Attack on Titan anime graphic T-shirt product photo showing bold red and dark graphic design with Survey Corps wings motif on a clean background (attack-on-titan-shirt.dim_800x1000.png)
